details: Installed Thjodann/Wikiwiki into PRISM, initialized the Wikiwiki config and record store, added npm scripts, and rendered the initial Markdown wiki plus static wiki site.

summary: Wiki site restyled with PRISM visual language
details: Reworked .wikiwiki/site-theme.json to use PRISM app CSS cues: dark-by-default warm shell, cream text, refracted spectrum accents, conic brand mark, radial hero glows, glassy cards, large radii, and a warm neutral light fallback.

summary: Wikiwiki updated and first-run theming retested
details: Updated the installed wk dependency to Wikiwiki commit ab7e817 and verified the initial setup/theme/render/site path against PRISM source files. Theme preview now sanitizes README logo HTML, inspects PRISM CSS/design sources, and generates a dark-first PRISM-branded site without hand-editing generated CSS.
